success.title: Success!

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.heading: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect with popular tools and services to sync your work across your entire workflow ecosystem.
integrations.page_title: Work with your DragonFruit data in available apps or your own.
integrations.page_description: View all the integrations in use by this workspace or you.

imports.title: Imports
imports.heading: Imports
imports.description: Bring work in from other tools. CSV is ready to go; Notion and ClickUp need a quick OAuth app setup first.

csv.title: CSV
csv.description: Upload a spreadsheet exported from anywhere. Each row becomes an issue.

notion.title: Notion
notion.description: Pull pages from a Notion database into a project as issues.

clickup.title: ClickUp
clickup.description: Sync tasks from a ClickUp list into a project.

csv_modal.title: Import from CSV
csv_modal.file_hint: First row should be headers. UTF-8, comma-separated.
csv_modal.drop_or_click: Drop a .csv file here or click to choose
csv_modal.mapping_hint: We tried to auto-match by header name. Adjust as needed.
csv_modal.error_no_name: Map at least one column to Title.
csv_modal.error_parse: Couldn't parse this file as CSV.
csv_modal.error_empty: No data rows found in this file.

connect_modal.title: Connect {service}
connect_modal.intro: {service} import isn't wired up yet on this instance. You'll need to do a one-time setup before this card becomes usable:
connect_modal.steps_notion_1: Create an internal integration at https://www.notion.so/my-integrations and copy the secret.
connect_modal.steps_notion_2: Set NOTION_CLIENT_ID, NOTION_CLIENT_SECRET, and NOTION_REDIRECT_URI in your .env.
connect_modal.steps_notion_3: Restart the API server. Then come back here and click Connect.
connect_modal.steps_clickup_1: Create an OAuth app at https://app.clickup.com/settings/team/{your-team}/apps and copy the client ID + secret.
connect_modal.steps_clickup_2: Set CLICKUP_CLIENT_ID, CLICKUP_CLIENT_SECRET, and CLICKUP_REDIRECT_URI in your .env.
connect_modal.steps_clickup_3: Restart the API server. Then come back here and click Connect.

worklogs.title: Worklogs
worklogs.heading: Worklogs
worklogs.description: Download worklogs AKA timesheets for anyone in any project.

group_syncing.title: Group syncing
group_syncing.heading: Group syncing
group_syncing.description: Link identity provider groups to projects and roles. User access updates automatically when group membership changes in your IdP, simplifying onboarding and offboarding.

enable.title: Enable group syncing
enable.description: Automatically add users to projects based on identity provider groups.

config.title: Configure group sync
config.description: Set up how identity provider groups are mapped to projects and roles.

sync_on_login.title: Sync on login
sync_on_login.description: Update group membership and project access when a user signs in.

sync_offline.title: Offline sync
sync_offline.description: Runs sync every six hours automatically, without waiting for users to log in.

auto_remove.title: Auto remove
auto_remove.description: Automatically remove users from projects when they no longer match the group.

group_attribute_key.title: Group attribute key
group_attribute_key.description: The identity provider attribute used to identify and sync user groups.

group_mapping.title: Group mapping
group_mapping.description: Link identity provider groups to projects and roles.

toast.error: Failed to update group syncing feature!

delete_modal.title: Delete group sync
delete_modal.content: New users from this identity group will no longer be added to the project. Users already added will keep their current role.

templates.description: Save 80% time spent on creating projects, tasks, and pages when you use templates.

setup_url.description: Users will be redirected to this URL when they install the app.

webhook_secret.description: Secret used to verify incoming webhook requests.

redirect_uris.label: Redirect URIs (space separated)
redirect_uris.description: Users will be redirected to this path after they have authenticated with DragonFruit.

applications.app_available_description: Connect a DragonFruit workspace to start using it
applications.client_id_and_secret_description: Copy and save this secret key in Pages. You can't see this key again after you hit Close.
applications.client_id_and_secret_download: You can download a CSV with the key from here.
applications.redirect_uris_description: Enter space seperated URIs where the app will redirect to after the user e.g https://example.com https://example.com/
applications.authorized_javascript_origins_descriptio: Enter space seperated origins where the app will be allowed to make requests e.g app.com example.com
applications.regenerate_client_secret_description: Regenerate the client secret. If you regenerate the secret, you can copy the key or download it to a CSV file right after.

applications.regenerate_client_secret_confirm_descrip: App using this secret will stop working. You will need to update the secret in the app.
